# Small synthetic document for benchmarking

# This is committed to git as a baseline reference

---
title: "Benchmark Document"
author: "Test"
format: html
---

# Introduction

This is a paragraph with **bold** and *italic* text. We also have `inline code`
and [links](https://example.com).

## Lists and Tables

- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item
- Item 3

  | Column 1 | Column 2 | Column 3 |
  | -------- | -------- | -------- |
  | Data 1   | Data 2   | Data 3   |
  | Data 4   | Data 5   | Data 6   |

### Code Blocks

```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");
}
```

## Math

Inline math: $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$

Display math:

$$
\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} dx = \sqrt{\pi}
$$

::: {.callout-note}
This is a Quarto-style callout block.
:::
